creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 243509
port-list.txt

Machine learning is a new, emerging area that has more and more software developed for it.

The machine learning ports really don't fit any other category because they are essentially in a category of their own.

There are currently 57 machine learning ports, the list is attached. In all likelihood more and more machine learning ports will be added.

I suggest to add the real category "machine-learning" and to move them there.
